title: BandMathRecipe
description:
Apply math expressions or per-pixel reducers across one or more input images to emit derived bands. Wraps `ee.Image.expression()` and `ee.Reducer.<reducer>`.

Uses: vegetation indices (NDVI = (nir-red)/(nir+red)), forest masks (`canopy_cover > 30`), composite metrics, ratios.

Pipeline: (1) load each `inputImagery.images[*]`, keep `includedBands`; (2) for each `calculations.calculations[*]` evaluate EXPRESSION (math expression by image `name`) or FUNCTION (reducer over `usedBands`); (3) stack as bands and surface via `outputBands.outputImages`.

AOI implicit in input imagery. **LLM populates everything** — input images, calculations, output band selection. Defaults are empty.

bandNames.description: GUI-maintained band-name cache (syncBandNames action). Cosmetic — LLM doesn't set.

inputImagery.title: BandMathInputImagery
inputImagery.description: Source images calculations can reference. Each gets a stable `imageId` (UUID) and a user-chosen `name` — calculations reference by `name` in expressions or `imageId` in `usedBands`.

name.description: Identifier in EXPRESSION calculations (e.g. `i1.nir - i1.red`). Max 30 chars; first char letter/underscore.

id.description: SEPAL recipe id or EE asset id.

bands.description: Per-band metadata keyed by band name. Categorical entry: `{values, labels, palette}`; continuous entry: `{}`. Build via `image_bands({type, id})` for the names + `image_visualizations({type, id, band})` per band (returns `values`/`labels`/`palette` for categorical, nothing for continuous). Optional — GUI refetches on form open if absent, but providing it avoids that fetch and lets the Mapping panel render immediately.

name.description: Band name on the source image.

includedBands.description: Subset of source bands exposed to calculations. Only listed bands are referenceable.

calculations.title: BandMathCalculations
calculations.description: Math expressions / reducer aggregations producing derived bands.

calculation.title: BandMathCalculation
calculation.description:
Single derived-band calculation. Two modes:
- `EXPRESSION` — `ee.Image().expression(expression, {<imageName>: eeImage, ...})`. Reference bands as `<imageName>.<bandName>`. Math constants `E, LN10, LN2, LOG10E, LOG2E, PI, SQRT1_2, SQRT2` available.
- `FUNCTION` — apply `ee.Reducer.<reducer>` per pixel across `usedBands` (which may span multiple images).

imageId.description: UUID. Later calculations may reference its output by `name` like an input image.

name.description: Identifier. Must NOT collide with any other calculation/input `name`; must NOT match a reserved math function name (sqrt, log, etc.).

dataType.description: Output dtype. `auto` (default) keeps EE's inferred type; specific values cast via `ee.Image.cast`.

imageId.description: imageId of an input image OR another calculation.

usedBands.description: Bands available to expression/reducer. Required for EXPRESSION (validates references) and FUNCTION (reducer input stack).

expression.description: Math expression for EXPRESSION. Required when `type='EXPRESSION'`. EE syntax: arithmetic (`+ - * / %`), comparisons, conditionals, math functions (`sqrt`, `log`, `exp`, `min`, `max`, `pow`, `abs`).

reducer.description: EE reducer name (`sum`, `min`, `max`, `mean`, `median`, `mode`, `stdDev`, `variance`, `count`) for FUNCTION. Required when `type='FUNCTION'`.

includedBands.description: Output band(s) produced. Single entry for single-output calculations (e.g. reducer); multiple for expressions producing multiple renamed bands.

bandRenameStrategy.description: Multi-band input rename strategy. PREFIX/SUFFIX add `bandRename` before/after each name; REGEX uses `regex` + `bandRename` for search/replace.

outputBands.title: BandMathOutputBands
outputBands.description: Selects which calculation outputs (and which of their bands) the recipe exposes, with optional rename. Bands not listed are dropped.

imageId.description: Calculation imageId whose output is exposed.

name.description: Source band name within the calculation.

outputName.description: Optional rename for recipe's final output. Must be unique across all output bands.
